name: Bella
message: Buffet night sounds awesome. Bring some recipes home for Sunday dinner

name: haleigh b.
message: so proud of you! buffet night sounds so good. the views look amazing. have fun & be safe!! 💕

name: Kee
message: Buffet night sounds so fun!! I’m a foodie and would love that!! This is such an interesting and exciting journey to follow! I was talking about you at work yesterday, because our executive director is taking a 70-mile hike next week in NM! I was like… well I gotta tell you about Laura! Then he said his dad also did the AT many years ago!!! So proud of you girl!!!

name: Paul Cracknell
message: Always on my mind. Go Laura, go!
